productDisplayName: Rockport Men's Aderner Friar Brown Shoe
description: Designed for elegance and comfort, rockport shoes are engineered with DMX technology that generates air flow dynamically while you walk, creating a cushion for your feet. This makes rockport Aderner shoes an absolute favourite for everyday wear, as it makes for a great set of casual formals with a solid blend of form and function. Upper Full-grain leather upper with nappa lining for added strength and durability and to retain the natural look of the hide Padded tongue and collar to help protect from excessive rubbing and prevent blisters Midsole Moulded footbed made of PU for long term wear Shock absorbant cushioning to reduce foot fatigue Strobel technology on the heel to provide cushioned comfort for the feet and enhance support and flexibility to aid comfortable walking Outsole Lightweight, slip-resistant rubber outsole delivers shock absorption reducing foot fatigue Horizontal grooves through out for better grip Rectangular grooves on the lateral heel, midfoot and medial forefoot for improved grip and traction on various surfaces Horse shoe pattern with scooped heel for cushioing Flex grooves for easy movement Raised heel for a stylish look Shoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditioner and leather brush to restore shineDo not store in direct sunlight
